coverage.description: All major facets of the research question addressed

sourcing.description: Every claim has a verifiable, non-circular source

depth.description: Mechanisms explained, not just conclusions stated

breadth.description: Multiple perspectives and edge cases covered

contradiction_handling.description: Contested claims flagged with evidence on both sides

completeness.description: No truncation, no ellipsis, no 'and more' cop-outs

synthesis_quality.description: Evidence integrated into coherent conclusions, not just listed
